use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation bars, comment sections, or user lists
Showing avatar fallback initials when no image is available
Representing users or entities in dashboards and admin panels
Creating identity indicators in social feeds or messaging interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with support for images and fallback states. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a rounded-full design. The component exports three sub-components: Avatar (root), AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback for flexible usage patterns across different application contexts.
